query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "leveraging verifier-based reinforcement learning in image editing" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for reinforcement learning optimization techniques, and criterion (a) by addressing the core mechanism of accelerating convergence in RL, which is directly relevant to improving the efficiency of the "Verifier-Based Reinforcement Learning" framework mentioned in the user's question.
